result.task: Write a spec (no build) — Instrument-then-harden the Dark Factory dispatch loop, via appydave:spec-writer.
result.centered_on: OBSERVE THE LOOP EXTERNALLY — dispatcher/claim-next/done-watcher/reaper/AppyCtrl emit lifecycle events; never trust the worker.
defines: event schema (lifecycle event + derived per-job record)
metrics: handback-success rate, run-record-written rate, clean-teardown rate, orphan count, failure counts (per-cause), durations, stray-running count
smallest first step: dispatcher+reaper events -> Switchboard -> handback-written-rate + clean-teardown-rate
8 testable acceptance criteria, 8 NFRs, 5 open PO decisions
